content.text: I'll read each frame and judge against the rubric.

[
{"ruleId":"V1","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Each frame has a clear single focus: frame 1 the 'Guess' title, frames 2-3 the doubling of the periwinkle vector and score, frames 5-6 the closing question with the chip.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V2","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"No frame introduces more than four novel elements at once; the vector, score box, flag, and questions build progressively.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V3","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The 'c1' label sits on the vector and 'direction kept' sits beside it; no boxed legend or corner key appears.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V4","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The floating questions in frames 5-6 accompany the visible c1 vector and the 'ways to keep going' chip, functioning as the closing walk-home card annotations.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V5","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Titles, the 4.2/8.4 readouts, labels, and chip text are all comfortably above the legibility threshold.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V6","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All vectors, boxes, flags, and text sit within the frame with margins; nothing is cropped.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V7","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"No text or labels overlap; the stacked 4.2/x2/8.4 readouts are cleanly separated inside their box.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V8","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The candidate vector is periwinkle (observed), the score readouts are lilac (parameters/number), and the 'size passes through' flag is rose, matching token semantics.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V9","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Every element carries content: the vector, dashed bounding box, score readouts, rose flag, and chip all have propositional roles.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V10","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The frames show the periwinkle candidate doubling in length while direction holds, the lilac 4.2→8.4 doubling stacked, a rose 'size passes through' flag, and the closing question with a chip pointing to the extensions menu.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V11","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The score box sits to the right of the vector, a deliberate comparison layout, and the flag sits directly under the readout it explains.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V12","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Across frames the vector visibly lengthens and the score reads out continuously rather than cutting to a finished state.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V13","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The compositions keep generous margins and a clear reading order from vector to score to closing question.","suggestion":""}
]
